author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Remove all references to the V16 HGCal version inside Geometry/HGCalCommonData

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

title: Phase2-hgx366H Remove all references to the V16 HGCal version inside Geometry/HGCalCommonData
